Upload Attendance Sheet

📄

Drop your attendance sheet here

Click to browse files from your computer

Supports JPG, PNG, PDF — max 10MB
📎

Sheet Details

Auto-detected from scanned sheet. Review and confirm.
🤖 AI Detected

💡 How It Works

1
Upload Scanned Sheet
Photograph or scan the signed attendance sheet and upload it here.
2
AI Reads the Sheet
Our AI engine scans the document, detects header fields and student signatures automatically.
3
Review & Correct
Check each student's attendance. Toggle Present/Absent. Make corrections before confirming.
4
Attendance Updated
After confirmation, student records are automatically updated and reports reflect immediately.

Uploaded Sheets

—
#SubjectTeacherSemesterPeriodHallDateTimeTypeActions
📅

Select a date range and generate

📆

Select a month and generate

👤

Search a student to view their attendance

⬇ Export Attendance Data

Export your attendance records for offline use, sharing, or archival.
📄 CSV Format
Compatible with Excel, Google Sheets, and any spreadsheet software.
📊 Excel Format (.xls)
Opens directly in Microsoft Excel with proper column formatting.
⚠️ Defaulter List
Export all students below 75% attendance as CSV.
🗄 Full System Backup (JSON)
Complete backup of all data. Use to restore in future.
🖨️ Print Register
Print the attendance register directly from your browser.

📊 Data Summary

⚙ Admin Account

🗄 Data Retention

When a student is deleted, their attendance records are kept for this many months before permanent removal.

🗃 Archived Students (Deleted)

—
Roll NoNameProgrammeSemDeleted OnData Expires OnActions

🏫 System Info & Danger Zone

ASBM University · Attendance Management System v2.0 · Academic Administration Portal
⚠️ Data is stored in your browser. Export a JSON backup regularly to avoid data loss if you clear browser storage.

AI Engine Processing

Analysing your attendance sheet. Detecting header fields and student signatures…

Loading document
Reading header fields
Detecting student rows
Analysing signatures
Computing confidence scores

Import Students from CSV

Required CSV headers (exact):
roll_no, student_name, programme, semester

Changes here will immediately recalculate the student's attendance percentage.

Verify each student's attendance before confirming. Toggle to correct any errors.
